title: OpenAI introduces its 'Jalapeño' chip and Qualcomm buys Modular for 4 billion
summary: The semiconductor industry is restructuring with bets on artificial intelligence and efficiency.

title: Slate launches a simple electric truck from $24,950 without radio or power windows
summary: The startup seeks to democratize electric vehicles with a minimalist and extremely cheap model.

title: GTA VI confirms editions, prices, and better performance on PS5
summary: Rockstar details the launch plans for the most anticipated video game, which will include disc-free physical versions.

title: Valve extends SteamOS to all PCs and allows creating Steam Machines with AMD GPU
summary: Valve's gaming platform becomes universal by collaborating with Intel, AMD, and Nvidia for compatibility.

title: Meta launches smart glasses at $299 without the Ray-Ban brand
summary: The new augmented reality glasses aim to be more affordable by dropping the partnership with Ray-Ban.

title: Zoox perfects its robotaxis for commercial service with improvements in comfort and smell
summary: Amazon's autonomous vehicle company prepares to launch its public service.

title: Mistral launches OCR 4 with multilingual extraction and claims to outperform competitors
summary: The new optical character recognition model beats its rivals in 72% of cases, according to the company.

title: Claude Tag integrates Anthropic's AI into Slack to automate tasks and write code
summary: The beta tool already generates 65% of the company's internal code and promises to increase productivity.

title: Figma adds code layers, animations, and new AI features
summary: The design platform updates with its own and third-party artificial intelligence tools.

title: LastPass suffers a data breach due to a supply chain attack on Klue
summary: Attackers stole credentials since 2022 that exposed LastPass customer information.

title: Mythos discovers the 'Squidbleed' memory leak that existed since the Clinton era and loses NSA access
summary: The cybersecurity company faces a dispute with Anthropic and reveals a historical vulnerability.

title: Europe imposes a fixed tariff of three euros on small packages and rejection of Big Tech grows
summary: The European Union takes measures to protect its market and privacy against US companies.

title: Menlo Ventures raises $3 billion after its bet on Anthropic
summary: The venture capital firm also points out the identity crisis affecting software engineers due to AI.

title: Tesla investigated for fatal accident in Texas and faces obstacles in Europe for autonomous driving
summary: The NTSB investigates a fatal crash while Sweden complicates the company's plans in the European market.

title: Investment strategies in a world of geopolitical volatility and rapid changes
summary: Experts analyze how to adapt finances to an uncertain and accelerated environment.

title: Millionaires flee some countries and take refuge in others: the new routes of wealth
summary: The movement of great fortunes reshapes the global economy, with preferred destinations such as Singapore, Italy, or Switzerland.

title: Lime goes public and Agility Robotics opts for a SPAC merger to list
summary: Two mobility and robotics companies seek financing in public markets.

title: Anthropic discovers vulnerabilities in government systems and the White House criticizes its CEO
summary: The artificial intelligence company finds itself at the center of a political storm after revealing security flaws.

title: Companies seek to reduce AI spending while token prices plummet
summary: From Snowflake to Accenture, the industry rethinks its strategies to make more efficient use of artificial intelligence.

title: Nvidia announces liquid cooling without water consumption but its RTX 50 suffer overheating issues
summary: The company faces technical challenges in its new generation of graphics cards while innovating in efficiency.
